text:
Thank you all for coming out today to The Land of the Ewoks event 🐻✨
Seeing so many Shih Tzus and their amazing humans together was truly something special.

This is the official page of the NYC Shih Tzu Meetup—no one else.

Mark your calendars—our next NYC Shih Tzu Meetup will be Sunday, October 11th.
Location to be determined… but you know it’ll be worth the wait.

#shihtzusofinstagram #shihtzugram #shihtzunation #shihtzu
